ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the object was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the object */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the object data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sequence was last updated */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "testing_data" TEXT /* Testing data used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the prediction is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction record was last updated */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_probabilities" (
  "prob_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability record */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the probability is for */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the probability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the probability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prob_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_probabilities_feature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_probabilities_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, business analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion" (
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingestion task */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being ingested */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date when the ingestion occurred */,
  "ingestion_type" TEXT /* Type of ingestion (e.g., batch, real-time) */,
  "ingestion_status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the report is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "scheduling_settings" TEXT /* Scheduling settings for the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "vis_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the visualization is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the visualization is based on */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the visualization file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  "visualization_settings" TEXT /* Settings used for the visualization (e.g., colors, fonts) */,
  "data_filters" TEXT /* Data filters applied to the visualization (e.g., date range, categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)
